zh.lifeSummary: 當John Garrard於大約1477年出生在英國肯特希廷波恩時，他的父親Lawrence Garrad31歲，母親Lady Sara Eppes32歲。他於1496年與Agnes Epes在英國英格蘭肯特笛卡爾 羅姆尼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在英國倫敦被列為grocer。他去世於大約1531年在英國肯特享年56歲，埋葬在英國肯特比登登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Garrard于大约1477年出生在英国肯特希廷波恩时，他的父亲Lawrence Garrad31岁，母亲Lady Sara Eppes32岁。他于1496年与Agnes Epes在英国英格兰肯特笛卡爾 羅姆尼结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在英国倫敦被列为grocer。他去世于大约1531年在英国肯特享年56岁，埋葬在英国肯特比登登。

nameMeanings.name: Garrard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Gerard  .
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Gerard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Jean-Pierre, Murielle, Emile, Pascal, Pierre, Agathe, Alain, Aldes, Antoine, Armand.

French (Gérard), Walloon (mainly Gérard), and English (of Norman origin): from the personal name Gérard, Gerard (from Old French Gerart, Girart), composed of the ancient Germanic elements gēr ‘spear, lance’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. As a surname of French origin it is also found in Haiti. Compare Garrard and also French Guerard , English Garard , Gerrard , and Jarrard .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Garrard was born about 1477, in Sittingbourne, Kent, England, his father, Lawrence Garrad, was 31 and his mother, Lady Sara Eppes, was 32. He married Agnes Epes in 1496, in Old Romney, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as grocer in London, England. He died about 1531, in Kent, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Biddenden, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Garrard est né environ 1477, à Sittingbourne, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Lawrence Garrad, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Sara Eppes, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Epes en 1496, à Old Romney, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est grocer à Londres, Angleterre. Il est décédé environ 1531, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Biddenden, Kent, Angleterre.

de.Old Romney Kent England: Old Romney, Kent, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Garrard um 1477 in Sittingbourne, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lawrence Garrad 31 und seine Mutter Lady Sara Eppes 32. Er hat 1496 in Old Romney, Kent, England, United Kingdom Agnes Epes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als grocer in London, England aufgeführt. Er starb um 1531 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Kent, England und wurde in Biddenden, Kent, England begraben.

Lui sposato Agnes Epes nel 1496, nel Old Romney, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come grocer nel London, England. Morì circa 1531, nel Kent, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Biddenden, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Garrardが約1477年にイギリスケントシッティングボウルンで生まれた時，父Lawrence Garradは31歳，母Lady Sara Eppesは32歳であった。1496年にイギリスイギリスケントオルド ロムニーでAgnes Epesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。イギリスロンドンでの職業はgrocerと記録されている。彼は約1531年にイギリスケントで56歳で死去し，イギリスケントビッドエンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Garrard(이)가 대략 1477년 영국 켄트 짓틴그보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lawrence Garrad(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Sara Eppes(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1496년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 드 롬니에서 Agnes Epes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 런던에서 grocer이었다. 그는 대략 1531년 영국 켄트에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 비데든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Garrard nasceu aproximadamente 1477, em Sittingbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lawrence Garrad, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Sara Eppes, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Epes em 1496, em Old Romney, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como grocer em London, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1531, em Kent, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Biddenden, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Garrard родился около 1477 г. в местности ситтингбурн, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Lawrence Garrad было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Sara Eppes, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Epes в 1496 г. в местности олд ромни, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии grocer в местности Лондон, Англия. Он умер около 1531 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности бидденден, кэнт, Англия.
